user_system_path: controller:autopilot must only emit generated fallback seams from live current source truth or current health output.
forbidden_files_raw: `app/**`, `components/**`, `lib/**` except the controller file above, `supabase/migrations/**`, `app/api/stripe/**`, paid generation routes, outbound email paths
required_local_proof: node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run scripts/__tests__/controller-autopilot.test.ts --reporter=verbose; npm run controller:autopilot; npm run health; npm run build
required_product_proof: Clean-tree controller rerun must not emit GENERATED-SOURCE-FRESHNESS-CONNECTOR-HEALTH when current health is fresh and no live source-truth finding exists.
acceptance_condition: controller:autopilot only emits generated fallback contracts from a live current source-truth finding. It must not emit stale source_freshness contracts from closed or absent findings.
stop_condition: Stop if controller still emits GENERATED-SOURCE-FRESHNESS-CONNECTOR-HEALTH without a live current finding, or if the next truthful state is an exact external blocker.
source_truth_finding: `GENERATED-SOURCE-FRESHNESS-CONNECTOR-HEALTH` does not map to a live current finding in `ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md` or health output, so this seam is not actionable now.
required_closure_update: Update ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md and append SESSION_HISTORY.md with the corrected controller state and the next truthful blocker or seam.
anti_regression_checks: fresh Gmail/Outlook plus current mail cursors must not emit source_freshness
closed handoff findings must not regenerate a contract
generated source_truth_finding must exist in current source truth or health output
next_command: Run FOLDERA CONTROLLED AUTOPILOT. Selected: CONTROLLER-LIVE-FINDING-VALIDATION. Allowed: .foldera-contract.json | scripts/controller-autopilot.ts | scripts/__tests__/controller-autopilot.test.ts | ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md | SESSION_HISTORY.md. Forbidden: app/** | components/** | lib/** except the controller file above | supabase/migrations/** | app/api/stripe/**. Proof: local="node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run scripts/__tests__/controller-autopilot.test.ts --reporter=verbose; npm run controller:autopilot; npm run health; npm run build" production="Clean-tree controller rerun must not emit GENERATED-SOURCE-FRESHNESS-CONNECTOR-HEALTH when current health is fresh and no live source-truth finding exists.". Stop when: Stop if controller still emits GENERATED-SOURCE-FRESHNESS-CONNECTOR-HEALTH without a live current finding, or if the next truthful state is an exact external blocker.
